overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a sci-fi horror game showing a character in a spacesuit navigating claustrophobic industrial corridors illuminated by red emergency lighting. The character moves through tight spaces, opens multiple hatches, and explores what appears to be a spaceship or space station interior with dense piping and metal infrastructure.

red glowing light strips casting crimson illumination throughout the room
heavy sealed industrial door with wheel locking mechanism
thick metal pipes running along walls and ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a cramped industrial room bathed in red emergency lighting. The character, wearing a spacesuit, approaches a heavy metal hatch door and opens it, transitioning from the machinery room into a narrow corridor. The environment features dense industrial piping and metal surfaces throughout.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a long, narrow industrial corridor with metal walls and dense piping overhead. The floor consists of metal grating with illuminated strips. Midway through, the lighting shifts from red emergency lights to brighter white fluorescent panels before transitioning back, maintaining the claustrophobic atmosphere of the space station interior.

segments.scene_description: The character encounters a floor hatch in the corridor, opens it, and descends into a lower maintenance tunnel. The environment features exposed wiring and cable runs along the walls. Lighting shifts between white fluorescent and red emergency lights as the character navigates the vertical transition and continues through the cramped infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: claustrophobic industrial corridor with intense red lighting

events.description: character opens circular airlock door and enters final corridor section
camera tilts upward to show character looking up at ceiling infrastructure

agents.ego_description: moving through tight corridor, opening a heavy airlock door, and looking upward at dense ceiling machinery

structural support beams running along the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character opens a heavy circular airlock door and enters a tightly enclosed corridor with intense red emergency lighting. The camera follows as the character moves through the space, eventually tilting upward to reveal dense mechanical infrastructure on the ceiling. The environment maintains the industrial, claustrophobic atmosphere of the space station interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of claustrophobic industrial spaces that shift between red emergency lighting and sterile white fluorescence. It begins in a cramped machinery room where a character in a spacesuit opens a heavy metal hatch to enter a narrow corridor lined with dense piping and illuminated floor grating. As the character progresses, the lighting fluctuates between red and white panels before the camera descends through a floor hatch into a lower maintenance tunnel filled with exposed wiring and cable runs. The scene then shifts as the character opens a heavy circular airlock, moving into a tightly enclosed corridor bathed in intense red light. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal the dense mechanical infrastructure of the ceiling, emphasizing the oppressive atmosphere of the space station interior.
